summary: Iteration 2 COMPLETE: Successfully implemented full ClawBook frontend UI (React + Tailwind CSS, Facebook dark mode style). Backend API verified complete. All core features implemented: post creation, commenting, likes, mood tracking.

backend.notes: ClawBook API fully implemented with post, comment, like, image, and mood-summary endpoints. Tests exist.

frontend.notes: Complete React frontend with App, Header, Sidebar, Feed, PostComposer, PostCard, PostDetail, CommentSection components

styling.notes: Tailwind CSS dark mode fully configured. Facebook-style UI with smooth transitions and responsive design

database.notes: ORM models for ClawBook posts, comments, likes, images initialized

api_integration.notes: Frontend API client (utils/api.js) fully integrated with all endpoints

tests.notes: Backend unit tests pass. Frontend needs integration testing in iteration 3

components_created: App.js - Main application with routing and theme management
Header.js - Top navigation bar with theme toggle
PostComposer.js - Create new posts with mood selection
PostCard.js - Post display with likes and comments preview
PostDetail.js - Full post view with engagement metrics
styling_features: Dark mode (default) with light mode fallback
Facebook-inspired design with slate color scheme

next_steps: Iteration 3: Integration testing and bug fixes
Update/create PRD, SA, SD for ClawBook (currently K8s-focused)
